Video.summary: Humor has no international borders. We're bringing you the most hilarious moments across the globe.
Video.title: World's Funniest Videos Top 10 Countdown

Video.summary: A rubber rat scares a man; - honeymooners break the bed; and a boy running the - bases tackles a taco mascot.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: A toddler falls through a basketball hoop; Granny falls off the - wagon wheel; and a baseball beans Grandpa.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: A man can't control a fire hose; plus previous winners return to - compete for the $100,000 grand prize.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: A countdown of classic clips, greatest groin hits, and a look back at past hosts and fan favorites.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: Tom's Home Movies, greatest groin hits, fan favorite reveal, and winning reactions.
Video.title: America's Funniest Home Videos

Video.summary: Wedding mishaps, adorable babies, and a teen's haircut prank gone wrong.
